docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRASCO, ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SINGH, ASHLEY MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED- SERVED JUL-20-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, ASHLEY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2013 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRASCO, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, ASHLEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRASCO, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGH, ASHLEY $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CARRASCO, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, ASHLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SINGH, ASHLEY HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ASHLEY SINGH IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
